topic: In the gym mirror, my reflection keeps lifting after I have stopped.
title: My Reflection Kept Lifting After I Stopped | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: In the gym mirror, my reflection kept lifting after I had already stopped.
scenes.image_prompt: A dim gym weight room facing a long wall mirror, barbell rack, low warm light, faint reflection in the glass, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is a basement gym, open all night, almost always empty.
scenes.image_prompt: Empty basement gym at night, rubber flooring, fluorescent tubes buzzing, machines casting long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I lift alone at the same late hour every night.
scenes.image_prompt: A single barbell loaded on the floor before a mirror wall, deep shadow, harsh overhead light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: That night I racked the weight, exhaled, and looked up.
scenes.image_prompt: Close still of hands chalked and resting on a barbell, dim gym light behind, sweat on metal, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My reflection did one more rep without me.
scenes.image_prompt: A wall mirror reflecting an empty bench and barbell, faint motion blur in the glass, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I froze. The reflection set the bar down a beat too late.
scenes.image_prompt: Reflection of a weight bench in a gym mirror, barbell slightly out of place versus the real one, dim glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I filmed it the next night, propping my phone against a dumbbell.
scenes.image_prompt: A phone leaning against a dumbbell on gym floor, screen glowing faintly, mirror wall beyond in shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: On the video, the reflection kept moving for three full seconds.
scenes.image_prompt: Grainy phone footage of a gym mirror, blurred reflected figure mid-motion, fluorescent flicker, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each night the delay grew. My reflection lifted longer, harder, hungrier.
scenes.image_prompt: Long gym mirror at night, reflection slightly darker and more defined than the dim room, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I stopped. In the glass, it stepped toward me.
scenes.image_prompt: A gym mirror with a silhouette in the reflection standing closer to the glass than the empty room allows, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I left the bar on the floor and never went back.
scenes.image_prompt: Abandoned barbell on an empty gym floor, lights half off, exit sign glowing red in the dark, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My mirror at home now shows me resting between sets I never did.
scenes.image_prompt: A bathroom mirror in dim light reflecting an empty room, faint outline where a figure would stand, soft shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
